rows.label: qev013402_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Wha!? 
Uwaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0002
rows.name:
W-Wait... You came at the perfect time! 
An alien appeared...! 
T-This is a Ma-non, right!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0003
rows.name:
What do we do!? 
We're gonna be caught and used as materials for human experiments... 
Or roasted whole and eaten![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I will not eat you... 
Please do not be so frightened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0005
rows.name:
I want to become friends with Earthlings. 
I am very happy to meet you like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even if you say that, 
there's no way I can believe it! 
Right? You think so too, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev013402_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that it's dangerous to trust unknown xenos.

rows.label: qev013402_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev013402_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Sarona the Ma-non is clearly not hostile.

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0007
rows.name:
R-Right! 
If someone like you says so, 
there's no way it's a mistake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey...! 
If you come any closer, I'll shoot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0009
rows.name:
No way! 
My buddy told me that Ma-non have amazing technology 
and are dangerous guys![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ma-non hold no hostility toward Earthlings. 
At the very least, I have absolutely no intention 
of causing you any harm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0011
rows.name:
Nope! I don't believe you! 
Hey...! 
If you come any closer, I'll shoot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0012
rows.name:
Is that so... I am very disappointed... 
Can we not be friends...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Umm, if you are going to explore this area, 
please be careful of Vasalts. 
Several Ma-non individuals have been attacked.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0014
rows.name:
That girl... 
seemed kinda sad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Wait, no, no, no! 
She's a dangerous alien![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0016
rows.name: Oh right! The ore I asked you for...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Alright! 
Looks like you got it perfectly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0017
rows.name:
As expected! 
I feel like there might be even more useful things 
buried in this mountain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013402_MSG0018
rows.name:
Let's not pay attention to aliens like that 
and continue exploring! 
I'm... going on ahead![ST:wait ]
